parameters.content:
## Wall-Coverings Image Classifier 2026

Reads every row in the **Wall-Coverings** tab that has an image URL but no `Category_Name` yet. Sends the image to **Gemini 2.5 Pro**, classifies it into the 4-category system, generates a descriptive name, and writes back:

| Column | What gets filled |
|---|---|
| `Category_Name` | Main category full name |
| `Subcategory_Name` | Subcategory name (only for category B) |
| `Wall_Panel_Name` | AI descriptive name, e.g. "Fluted Marble Wall Panel" |
| `Collection_ID1` | Shopify collection ID for main category |
| `Collection_ID2` | Shopify collection ID for subcategory (B only) |

**Setup before first run:**
1. Add 3 new columns to the Wall-Coverings tab: `Category_Name`, `Subcategory_Name`, `Wall_Panel_Name`.
2. Select your Google Sheets credential on the sheet nodes.
3. Select your Google Gemini credential on the Analyze node.

**Safe to re-run** — rows that already have `Category_Name` are skipped automatically.

**Flow:** Filter & Build Prompts → Limit → Analyze an image → Parse & Map → Update Sheet
